tools.name: Arena (LMArena)
tools.description: Community-powered platform for comparing image generators via anonymous head-to-head battles. 70 image models available.

free_tier_limits.free_images_per_day: undisclosed (daily limit exists, exact number not published)
free_tier_limits.credits_per_image: new unified credit system in development

tools.notes: All 70 image models free in Battle Mode via anonymous comparisons. Direct Mode requires account. Created by UC Berkeley researchers.

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.description: AI chatbot with integrated image generation via GPT-Image-1.5 and DALL-E 3. Free tier allows 2-3 images per 24h.

free_tier_limits.credits_per_image: no credit system — rolling window limit
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 2-3 images per 24h rolling window. Separate timer from text messages.

tools.notes: Free tier: 2-3 images/day (24h rolling window). Same model quality as paid — only quantity differs. GPT-Image-1.5 offers 4x faster gen over DALL-E 3.

tools.name: Gemini
tools.description: Google's AI assistant with built-in image generation via Nano Banana models. Free tier offers ~20 images/day.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: ~20 images/day with Nano Banana 2 only. May be demoted to slower model at cap.

tools.notes: Free tier: Nano Banana 2 only, ~20 images/day, 1K max resolution. Nano Banana Pro requires paid plan ($7.99+/mo). All images include SynthID watermark.

tools.name: Meta AI
tools.description: Free AI image generation powered by Emu model, integrated across WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, and Facebook.

free_tier_limits.credits_per_image: no credit system — free with watermark
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 25 images/day via Imagine feature. Each prompt produces 4 options. Resets daily.

tools.notes: Completely free, no paid tier required for image gen. Max resolution ~1280x1280. Watermarked outputs. Regional availability varies.

tools.name: Grok
tools.description: xAI's Grok Imagine generates images via Aurora model. Free tier removed March 2026 — requires SuperGrok ($30/mo).

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: SuperGrok ($30/mo) required for consumer image gen

tools.notes: Free image gen removed March 19, 2026 (deepfake controversy). SuperGrok ($30/mo) required. API: $25 free credits at signup + $150/mo via data-sharing.

tools.name: Leonardo AI
tools.description: Production-grade generative AI platform for images, video, and 3D textures with custom model training, AI Canvas editing, and game asset workflows. Acquired by Canva in 2024.

free_tier_limits.credit_expiry: tokens reset daily — unused tokens do NOT roll over
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 150 tokens/day. Basic quality only. Public generations only. No private images.

tools.notes: Free tier: 150 tokens/day, public images only, 1 concurrent gen. Paid plans start $12/mo. 29M+ users. Full commercial rights.

tools.name: NoteGPT
tools.description: All-in-one AI learning assistant with text-to-image, image editing, headshot generation, and 15+ image tools. Free tier includes 2 images/day.

free_tier_limits.free_images_per_month: 15 total quotas for ALL features (images share pool)
free_tier_limits.credits_per_image: 2 premium credits per image (free plan gives NO premium credits)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Shared quota across summarization, transcription, chat, images

tools.notes: Free tier: 15 total quotas/month, 2 free images/day. Pro $9.99/mo (50 imgs), Unlimited $29/mo (700 imgs), Max $99/mo (2500 imgs).

tools.name: Microsoft Designer
tools.description: AI-powered graphic design tool that creates professional visuals from text prompts using DALL-E 3, integrated into Microsoft 365.

free_tier_limits.credits_per_image: 1 boost per fast generation (no cost for standard speed)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 200 prompts per 24-hour period. After 15 fast, auto-switches to slower speed.

tools.notes: Free tier: 15 boosts/day. Copilot Pro ($20/mo) gives 100 boosts/day. DALL-E 3 only model. Integrated with Microsoft 365.

tools.name: Ideogram
tools.description: AI image generation platform with state-of-the-art text rendering, photorealism, and layout control. Open-weight models (Ideogram 4.0).

free_tier_limits.free_images_per_day: 10 slow credits (up to 4 variations each = ~40 images)
free_tier_limits.credits_per_image: 1 credit per prompt (generates up to 4 variations)
free_tier_limits.credit_expiry: Daily reset (weekly allocation resets Saturday 00:00 UTC)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Slow queue only (30-60 sec per image). All images PUBLIC on free tier.

tools.notes: Free plan: 10 slow credits/week (~40 imgs/week), 1 concurrent gen. All models available on free tier (slow queue). Plus $20/mo, Pro $60/mo.

tools.name: Playground AI
tools.description: AI design studio for logos, merch, posters, stickers, and social media. Text-to-print-ready designs with mockup generation.

free_tier_limits.credits_per_image: no credits system — time-window rate limiting
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 10 images per 3-hour rolling window. 3 combined edits/month. 10 downloads/day.

tools.notes: Free tier: PGv3 10 imgs/3hrs, GPT Image 2/Seedream/Nano Banana 3 gens/month, 10 downloads/day. 13M+ creators. Non-commercial on free tier.

tools.name: Bing Image Creator
tools.description: Microsoft's free AI image generator powered by multiple models (DALL-E 3, GPT-4o, MAI-Image-2e). Daily free fast creations.

free_tier_limits.credits_per_image: 1 boost per fast generation (no cost for standard speed)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 200 prompts per 24-hour period. DALL-E 3 produces 4 images/prompt, GPT-4o produces 1.

tools.notes: DALL-E 3 retiring soon. 15 free fast creations/day, unlimited standard-speed, 200 prompts/24hr cap. Requires personal Microsoft Account. Blocked in Russia/China.

tools.name: SparkPix
tools.description: Free AI photo editor and image generator with 100+ tools. Text-to-image in ~3s, no watermark, free commercial use.

free_tier_limits.credits_per_image: 5 credits per AI photo edit; image generator is 3 free/day separate
free_tier_limits.free_credits: 5 welcome credits on signup + 1 free credit/day
free_tier_limits.credit_expiry: Credits do not appear to expire
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 3 free image generations per day on AI Image Generator page

tools.notes: Free tier: 3 watermark-free images/day + 5 welcome credits. 800k+ users. Paid: $9.99 for 350 credits, $29.99 for 1200 credits.

tools.name: Canva AI
tools.description: All-in-one design platform with AI image generators: Magic Media (Stable Diffusion) and Dream Lab (Leonardo.ai). Generates layered, editable designs.
tools.referrals: yes - refer-a-friend earns 1 Canva credit per referral for premium elements.

free_tier_limits.free_images_per_month: up to 200 Standard AI uses OR 20 Premium AI uses (shared across all AI tools)
free_tier_limits.credits_per_image: uses AI allowance pool, not fixed per-image credits
free_tier_limits.credit_expiry: resets 1st of each month (unused credits do NOT roll over)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 200 max Standard AI uses OR 20 max Premium AI uses per month. No Ultra AI on free.

tools.notes: Free tier: 200 Standard AI or 20 Premium AI uses/month. Dream Lab free ~20 prompts/month. Third-party models (DALL-E, Imagen) are Premium only. Pro $15/mo.

tools.name: Adobe Firefly
tools.description: Adobe's all-in-one creative AI studio for images, video, audio, and vectors. Commercially safe, trained on licensed content.
tools.referrals: yes - Adobe Affiliate Program 85% of first month. No Firefly-specific referral.

free_tier_limits.credits_per_image: 1 credit per standard gen, 5 credits per HD gen, 1 credit per edit
free_tier_limits.credit_expiry: expire one month from allocation date (use on 15th → expire 15th next month)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 25 credits/month hard cap. Credits reset based on first-use date.

tools.notes: Free tier: 25 credits/month. Paid: Standard $9.99/mo (2K credits), Pro $19.99/mo (4K credits), Premium $199.99/mo (50K credits). Commercial use strongest on paid plans.

tools.name: NightCafe
tools.description: AI Art Generator with 50+ image/video models, daily free credits, art challenges, and vibrant creator community. 30M+ users.
tools.referrals: yes - give friends 20 free PRO creations, earn credits as they progress.

free_tier_limits.free_images_per_day: 5-15 (5 daily credits + 3 from challenge; SD costs 0.5-1 credit)
free_tier_limits.free_credits: 5 credits/day on login + up to 3 from daily challenge + 10 bonus every 5-day streak
free_tier_limits.credit_expiry: Free (relax) credits do NOT expire — they accumulate
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Free users: free-tier models only. Relax credits at lower priority. No hard cap on base SD.

tools.notes: Free tier: 5 credits/day + 3 from challenges + unlimited base SD generations. Commercial use allowed. Paid from $5.99/mo. 40% annual discount.

tools.name: Google Flow
tools.description: AI creative studio for images, videos, and custom tools. Merged Whisk AI + ImageFX + Flow into one workspace. Powered by Nano Banana, Veo 3.1, Gemini Omni.

free_tier_limits.credits_per_image: 0 credits for image gen. Credits only for video (Veo 3.1).
free_tier_limits.credit_expiry: daily credits expire end of day — no rollover
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: After many generations, speed may decrease. Image gen appears unlimited.

tools.notes: Most generous free IMAGE generator — unlimited images, no watermarks, Nano Banana Pro free. 50 daily credits for video only. One-time 100 welcome credits. Paid from $4.99/mo.
